title: aleuritia rhodochroa
side_effects: Aleuritia rhodochroa can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea, nausea, and abdominal pain. Overuse of the plant can also lead to allergic reactions, such as skin rashes, itching, and swelling. In severe cases, Aleuritia rhodochroa can cause respiratory problems, including shortness of breath and wheezing, particularly in individuals with pre-existing respiratory conditions. Furthermore, improper use of the plant may also interact with certain medications, exacerbating underlying health conditions.
